verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يسٓ
verses.text: Yā’ Sīn.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: By the wise Qur’ān!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: Surely you are indeed one of the envoys,

verses.quran_arabic: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: on a straight path,

verses.quran_arabic: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: a sending down of the Mighty, the Compassionate,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ اُ۬لۡعَزِيزِ اِ۬لرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ اُ۬لۡعَزِيزِ اِ۬لرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (God bestowed it as) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ اُ۬لْعَزِيزِ اِ۬لرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

canonical_variants.arabic: تَنزِيلُ اُ۬لْعَزِيزِ اِ۬لرَّحِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

verses.quran_arabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًۭا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَٰفِلُونَ
verses.text: so that you may warn a people. Their fathers have not been warned, and so they are oblivious.

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Certainly the word has proved true against most of them: ‘They will not believe.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَٰلًۭا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
verses.text: Surely We have placed chains on their necks, and it (reaches up) to the chin, and so they (are forced to) hold their heads up.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّۭا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّۭا فَأَغْشَيْنَٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: We have made a barrier before them and a barrier behind them, and We have covered them, and so they do not see.

verses.quran_arabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: (It is) the same for them whether you warn them or you do not warn them. They will not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍۢ وَأَجْرٍۢ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: You warn only the one who follows the Reminder and fears the Merciful in the unseen. So give him the good news of forgiveness and a generous reward.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: Surely We – We give the dead life and We write down what they have sent forward and their traces. And everything – We have counted it up in a clear record.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: Strike a parable for them: the companions of the town, when the envoys came to it.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍۢ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: When We sent two men to them, and they called them liars, We reinforced (them) with a third. They said, ‘Surely we are envoys to you.’

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمُ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَزۡنَا بِثَالِثٖ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُم مُّرۡسَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: when We sent them two persons but they disbelieved them, so We overpowered with a third. Then they said, “Truly, We are emissaries sent to you.”

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمُ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزۡنَا بِثَالِثٖ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُم مُّرۡسَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: when We sent them two persons but they disbelieved them, so We reinforced (them) with a third. Then they said, “Truly, We are emissaries sent to you.”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘You are nothing but human beings like us. The Merciful has not sent down anything. You are only lying.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Our Lord knows that we are indeed envoys to you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Nothing (depends) on us except the clear delivery (of the message).’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا۟ لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: They said, ‘Surely we have an evil omen about you. If indeed you do not stop, we shall indeed stone you, and a painful punishment from us will indeed touch you.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ طَٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌۭ مُّسْرِفُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Your evil omen refers to yourselves. If you had taken heed – No! You are a wanton people!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌۭ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: (Just then) a man came running from the farthest part of the city. He said, ‘My people! Follow the envoys!

verses.quran_arabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًۭا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: Follow those who do not ask you for any reward, and (who) are (rightly) guided.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Why should I not serve Him who created me? You will (all) be returned to Him.

verses.quran_arabic: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ بِضُرٍّۢ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
verses.text: Shall I take (other) gods instead of Him? If the Merciful intends any harm for me, their intercession will be of no use to me at all, nor will they save me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّىٓ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Surely then I would indeed be far astray.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ
verses.text: Surely I believe in your Lord, so listen to me!’

verses.quran_arabic: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: It was said, ‘Enter the Garden!’ He said, ‘Would that my people knew

verses.quran_arabic: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: that my Lord has forgiven me, and made me one of the honored.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.text: We did not send down on his people after him any force from the sky, nor are We (in the habit of) sending down (such a force).

verses.quran_arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ خَٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: It was only a single cry, and suddenly they were snuffed out.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Alas for the servants! Not one messenger comes to them whom they do not mock.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Do they not see how many generations We destroyed before them, (and) that they do not return to them?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن كُلٌّۭ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌۭ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: But every one of them will be brought forward before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّۭا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: A sign for them is the dead earth: We give it life, and bring forth grain from it, and from it they eat.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّٰتٍۢ مِّن نَّخِيلٍۢ وَأَعْنَٰبٍۢ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
verses.text: And We have placed in it gardens of date palms and grapes, and We have caused springs to gush forth in it,

verses.quran_arabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: so that they may eat from its fruit and what their hands have made. Will they not be thankful?

canonical_variants.arabic: لِيَأۡكُلُواْ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they may eat from its produce and (from) their own handiwork. So will they not give thanks?

canonical_variants.arabic: لِيَأۡكُلُواْ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡهُ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they may eat from its produce and (from) what their hands have made. So will they not give thanks?

verses.quran_arabic: سُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Glory to the One who created pairs of all that the earth grows, and of themselves, and of what they do not know.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
verses.text: A sign for them is the night: We strip the day from it, and suddenly they are in darkness.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّۢ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
verses.text: And the sun: it runs to a dwelling place (appointed) for it. That is the decree of the Mighty, the Knowing.

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَالشَّمْسُ تَجْرِي وَذَلِكَ مُسْتَقَرٌّ لَهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ
competing_variants.variant_english: And the sun runs, and that is its appointed term (stopping point). That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: وَحَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ، وَأَبُو كُرَيْبٍ - وَاللَّفْظُ لأَبِي كُرَيْبٍ - قَالاَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا الأَعْمَشُ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي ذَرٍّ، قَالَ دَخَلْتُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم جَالِسٌ فَلَمَّا غَابَتِ الشَّمْسُ قَالَ ‏"‏ يَا أَبَا ذَرٍّ هَلْ تَدْرِي أَيْنَ تَذْهَبُ هَذِهِ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ قَالَ قُلْتُ اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ فَإِنَّهَا تَذْهَبُ فَتَسْتَأْذِنُ فِي السُّجُودِ فَيُؤْذَنُ لَهَا وَكَأَنَّهَا قَدْ قِيلَ لَهَا ارْجِعِي مِنْ حَيْثُ جِئْتِ فَتَطْلُعُ مِنْ مَغْرِبِهَا ‏"‏ ‏.‏ قَالَ ثُمَّ قَرَأَ فِي قِرَاءَةِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ وَذَلِكَ مُسْتَقَرٌّ لَهَا ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Abu Dharr reported:I entered the mosque and the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was sitting there. When the sun disappeared (from the sight) he said: O Abu Dharr! Do you know where it goes? He (the narrator) said: Allah and His Apostle know best. He (the Holy Prophet) said. Verily it goes and begs permission, for prostration (to Allah) and the permission is granted to it. Once it would be said: Return to the place whence you came, and then it would rise from its setting place. Then he, after the recitation of 'Abdullah recited it: And that is its appointed term

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَالشَّمْسُ تَجْرِي ذَلِكَ مُسْتَقَرٌّ لَهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ
competing_variants.variant_english: And the sun runs; that is a fixed course (or resting place) for it. That is the decree of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ـ هُوَ التَّيْمِيُّ ـ عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي ذَرٍّ، قَالَ دَخَلْتُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم جَالِسٌ، فَلَمَّا غَرَبَتِ الشَّمْسُ قَالَ ‏"‏ يَا أَبَا ذَرٍّ هَلْ تَدْرِي أَيْنَ تَذْهَبُ هَذِهِ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ قُلْتُ اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ فَإِنَّهَا تَذْهَبُ تَسْتَأْذِنُ فِي السُّجُودِ فَيُؤْذَنُ لَهَا، وَكَأَنَّهَا قَدْ قِيلَ لَهَا ارْجِعِي مِنْ حَيْثُ جِئْتِ‏.‏ فَتَطْلُعُ مِنْ مَغْرِبِهَا ‏"‏‏.‏ ثُمَّ قَرَأَ ‏{‏ذَلِكَ مُسْتَقَرٌّ لَهَا‏}‏ فِي قِرَاءَةِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Abu Dharr:I entered the mosque while Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) was sitting there. When the sun had set, the Prophet (ﷺ) said, "O Abu Dharr! Do you know where this (sun) goes?" I said, "Allah and His Apostle know best." He said, "It goes and asks permission to prostrate, and it is allowed, and (one day) it, as if being ordered to return whence it came, then it will rise from the west." Then the Prophet (ﷺ) recited, "That: "And the sun runs on its fixed course (for a term decreed)," (36.38) as it is recited by `Abdullah

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
verses.text: And the moon: We have determined it by stations, until it returns like an old palm branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَاَلۡعُرۡجُونِ اِ۬لۡقَدِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ  عَادَ كَاَلۡعُرۡجُونِ اِ۬لۡقَدِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُۥ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُۥ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْقَمَرُ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُونِ اِ۬لْقَدِيمِۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْقَمَرُ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُونِ اِ۬لْقَدِيمِۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّۭ فِى فَلَكٍۢ يَسْبَحُونَ
verses.text: It is not fitting for the sun to overtake the moon, nor does the night outrun the day, but each floats in (its own) orbit.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: A sign for them is that We carried their descendants in the loaded ship,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ فِے اِ۬لْفُلْكِ اِ۬لْمَشْحُونِ
canonical_variants.english: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring(s) in the laden ship,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمُۥٓ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ فِے اِ۬لْفُلْكِ اِ۬لْمَشْحُونِ
canonical_variants.english: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring(s) in the laden ship,

verses.quran_arabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
verses.text: and We have created for them (ships) like it (in) which they sail.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
verses.text: If We (so) please, We drown them, and then (there is) no cry (for help) for them, nor are they saved,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ مِّنَّا وَمَتَٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍۢ
verses.text: except as a mercy from Us, and enjoyment (of life) for a time.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: When it is said to them, ‘Guard (yourselves) against what is before you and what is behind you, so that you may receive compassion’ –

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍۢ مِّنْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: yet not a sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord without their turning away from it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: When it is said to them, ‘Contribute from what God has provided you,’ those who disbelieve say to those who believe, ‘Shall we feed one whom, if God (so) pleased, He would have fed? You are only far astray!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘When (will) this promise (come to pass), if you are truthful?’

verses.quran_arabic: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
verses.text: They are only waiting for a single cry – it will seize them while they are (still) disputing,

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةًۭ وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: and then they will not be able to make a bequest, nor will they return to their (own) families.

verses.quran_arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
verses.text: There will be a blast on the trumpet, and suddenly they will come swooping down from the graves to their Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: They will say, ‘Alas for us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place? This is what the Merciful promised, and the envoys were truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌۭ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: It was only a single cry, and suddenly they are all brought forward before Us.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌۭ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: ‘Today no one will be done evil at all, nor will you be repaid (for anything) except what you have done.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍۢ فَٰكِهُونَ
verses.text: Surely the companions of the Garden today are busy rejoicing

verses.quran_arabic: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.text: – they and their spouses – reclining on couches in (places of) shade.

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٌۭ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: There they have fruit, and they have whatever they call for.

verses.quran_arabic: سَلَٰمٌۭ قَوْلًۭا مِّن رَّبٍّۢ رَّحِيمٍۢ
verses.text: ‘Peace!’ – a word (of greeting) from a compassionate Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱمْتَٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: ‘But separate (yourselves) today, you sinners!

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Did I not make a covenant with you, sons of Adam, that you should not serve Satan – surely he is a clear enemy to you –

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ
verses.text: and that you should serve Me? This is a straight path.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّۭا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Certainly he has led astray many multitudes of you. Did you not understand?

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: This is Gehenna, which you were promised.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: Burn in it today for what you disbelieved!’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Today We will set a seal on their mouths, but their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will bear witness about what they have earned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: If We (so) pleased, We would indeed have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to the path, but how could they see?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّۭا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: And if We (so) pleased, We would indeed have transformed them where they were, and they could not go on, nor could they return.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَٰتِهِمۡ فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مُضِيّٗا وَلَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And if We will, We can disfigure them right in their places, so that they can neither move forward nor go back.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمۡ فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مُضِيّٗا وَلَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And if We will, We can disfigure them right in their place, so that they can neither move forward nor go back.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: (To) whomever We grant a long life, We reverse him in (his) constitution. Do they not understand?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نَنكُسْهُ فِے اِ۬لْخَلْقِۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will youpl not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نَنكُسْهُ فِے اِ۬لْخَلْقِۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will youpl not reason?

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌۭ وَقُرْءَانٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: We have not taught him the (art of) poetry, nor is it fitting for him. It is nothing but a Reminder and a clear Qur’ān,

verses.quran_arabic: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّۭا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: so that he may warn whoever is living, and that the word may be proved true against the disbelievers.

canonical_variants.arabic: لِّتُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيّاٗ وَيَحِقَّ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَى اَ۬لْكَٰفِرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: so that yousg may forewarn whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: لِّتُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيّاٗ وَيَحِقَّ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَى اَ۬لْكٰ۪فِرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: so that yousg may forewarn whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَٰمًۭا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ
verses.text: Do they not see that We created for them – from what Our hands have made – livestock, and (that) they are their masters?

verses.quran_arabic: وَذَلَّلْنَٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: We have made them subservient to them, and some of them they ride, and some they eat.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And they have (other) benefits in them, and drinks. Will they not be thankful?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةًۭ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: But they have taken (other) gods, instead of God, so that they might be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: (But) they cannot help them, (for) they will be brought forward before them as a group.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: So do not let their saying cause you sorrow. Surely We know what they keep secret and what they speak aloud.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍۢ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Does the human not see that We created him from a drop? Yet suddenly he is a clear adversary.

verses.quran_arabic: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًۭا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He has struck a parable for Us and forgotten (the fact of) his creation. He says, ‘Who will give the bones life when they are decayed?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Say: ‘He will give them life who produced them the first time. He has knowledge of all creation,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًۭا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.text: who has made fire for you from the green tree – and so you (too) light a fire from it.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Is not the One who created the heavens and the earth able to create their equivalent? Yes indeed! He is the Creator, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.text: His only command, when He intends something, is to say to it, ‘Be!’ and it is.

verses.quran_arabic: فَسُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Glory to the One in whose His hand is the kingdom of everything! To Him you will be returned.
